tagline: Enhanced streaming capabilities for OpenSharing tables.
what_it_does: The `Trigger.AvailableNow` trigger now supports streaming reads from OpenSharing tables, capturing the current version of the shared table and processing all available data across multiple micro-batches. This mechanism allows for scheduled, batch-like incremental processing, adhering to limits set by `maxFilesPerTrigger` and `maxVersionsPerRpc`. This feature is available for users on Databricks Runtime 18.0 or higher.
why_it_matters: This update significantly enhances the efficiency of data processing workflows by allowing users to process all available data in a single run, rather than just one micro-batch. This capability is particularly beneficial for organizations that rely on timely data updates for analytics and reporting, ultimately improving productivity and decision-making processes.
plain_summary: You can now use a new trigger to efficiently process streaming data from shared tables.

capabilities.title: Batch-like Processing
capabilities.desc: Processes all available data across multiple micro-batches.

capabilities.title: Version Capture
capabilities.desc: Captures the current version of the shared table at the start of processing.

capabilities.title: Incremental Updates
capabilities.desc: Supports scheduled processing for timely data updates.

key_takeaway: The new `Trigger.AvailableNow` support for OpenSharing streaming enhances data processing efficiency and enables timely analytics.
